conversation.speaker: Alice
conversation.text: 这次如果又是登录或 token 的问题，我还是先去找 Bob 吧。上次 OAuth 回调出错也是他最后定方案的。

conversation.speaker: Alice

conversation.speaker: Bob

ground_truth_statements.object: 陈 responsible_for 权限字段说明

conversation.speaker: Alice
conversation.text: The OAuth rollout notes all point to Bob, and every login-related ticket has been assigned to him this sprint.

conversation.speaker: Carol
conversation.text: So if we have questions about authentication, should we start with Bob?

conversation.speaker: Alice
conversation.text: Yes, that seems like the right place to start.

conversation.speaker: Alice
conversation.text: 支付接口先别动，登录和令牌那块如果有问题我还是去找Bob；上次权限回调也是他改好的。

conversation.speaker: Chen
conversation.text: 那我把这次的OAuth报错先转给Bob？

conversation.speaker: Alice
conversation.text: 对，先让他看，其他后端问题再分给我。

conversation.speaker: Alice
conversation.text: The login issues should probably go straight to Bob; he was the one reviewing the token refresh flow last sprint.

conversation.speaker: Carol
conversation.text: So you want me to loop him in on the auth bug report?

conversation.speaker: Alice
conversation.text: Yes, that seems like the right owner to ask first.

conversation.speaker: Alice
conversation.text: Bob，今天的客户报告整理好了吗？下午会议前我们需要发出去。

conversation.speaker: Bob
conversation.text: 还差最后一页数据校对。别担心，我下班前一定发给你。

conversation.speaker: Alice
conversation.text: 好的，那我先准备会议材料。

ground_truth_statements.object: 下班前把客户报告发给Alice
